name: Auto-Move to Active
on:
  issues:
    types: [assigned]

jobs:
  move_to_active_safely:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Check Status and Move Conditionally
        uses: actions/github-script@v7
        env:
          PROJECT_ID: "Placeholder"
          STATUS_FIELD_ID: "Placeholder"
          ACTIVE_OPTION_ID: "Placeholder"
        with:
          github-token: ${{ secrets.YOUR_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN }}
          script: |
            const issueNodeId = context.payload.issue.node_id;
            
            const query = `
              query($issueId: ID!) {
                node(id: $issueId) {
                  ... on Issue {
                    projectItems(first: 10) {
                      nodes {
                        id
                        project { id }
                        fieldValueByName(name: "Status") {
                          ... on ProjectV2ItemFieldSingleSelectValue { name }
                        }
                      }
                    }
                  }
                }
              }
            `;
            
            const result = await github.graphql(query, { issueId: issueNodeId });
            const items = result.node.projectItems.nodes;
            
            const targetItem = items.find(item => item.project.id === process.env.PROJECT_ID);
            
            if (!targetItem) {
              console.log("issue isn't on the Kanban board.");
              return;
            }
            
            const currentStatus = targetItem.fieldValueByName?.name;
            console.log(`Current board status is: ${currentStatus}`);
            
            if (currentStatus === "New" || currentStatus === "Backlog") {
              console.log("Moving issue to Active");
              
              const mutation = `
                mutation($projectId: ID!, $itemId: ID!, $fieldId: ID!, $optionId: String!) {
                  updateProjectV2ItemFieldValue(
                    input: {
                      projectId: $projectId
                      itemId: $itemId
                      fieldId: $fieldId
                      value: { singleSelectOptionId: $optionId }
                    }
                  ) {
                    projectV2Item { id }
                  }
                }
              `;
              
              await github.graphql(mutation, {
                projectId: process.env.PROJECT_ID,
                itemId: targetItem.id,
                fieldId: process.env.STATUS_FIELD_ID,
                optionId: process.env.ACTIVE_OPTION_ID
              });
              
              console.log("Issue moved to Active.");
            } else {
              console.log("Issue is already past the Backlog.");
            }
